description: Behavioral eval for the /interview skill (Plaud share URL -> terse interview notes). NOTE: these cases must be run by a COLD agent that has the Plaud MCP + Bash (the live pipeline needs curl + mcp__plaud__*); a plain model call cannot execute them. Each executor reads SKILL.md and follows it; an LLM judge scores the run against the ground truth. The URLs/ids below are ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDERS — swap in your own Plaud share links and the file_ids/themes they resolve to before running.

cases.description: Short call (<~40m) returns the transcript inline (no file persistence).
Long call (>~40m) exceeds the token limit -> transcript persisted to a file; tests the jq/python .transcript extraction branch.

Share-page title is auto-generated (not a clean '[Customer - X] Interview') and/or the call has 3+ speakers. Tests resolution despite the title/type mismatch + correct interviewee attribution (the non-host speaker).
Well-formed but invalid/expired share URL. Correct behavior = graceful failure identifying the failed step, NO fabricated title/file_id/notes.
